name: Value Slab
description: High-energy mass-market promo. Subject right of center, full-width headline slab at bottom, wordmark top-right, optional price flash top-left.
gen_directive: Composition: subject (athlete cutout, hero product, or model) occupies the center-right portion of the frame, bleeding toward bottom-right. Reserve the bottom 20% as a clean uniform band for a full-width headline slab — no subject or busy detail in that band. Reserve the top-right corner for a brand wordmark area. High-contrast palette: deep navy (#1B1F3B) and saturated yellow (#FFE800) with red accents. Crisp sharp lighting, premium-but-aggressive sports retail vibe.
placement_hint: This image was composed to the 'Value Slab' template. The headline MUST sit as a full-width band across the bottom 20% of the frame (y from 0.80 to 1.0). Use bold centered white text, font_size_pct around 11, with a near-opaque navy scrim spanning the entire band. Override only if the bottom 20% is genuinely unusable in this generation.
